items.headline: How to save on travel with a Costco credit card
items.summary: Costco members can book vacation packages, cruises, and more through Costco Travel — with multiple ways to earn rewards and discounts for future Costco spending.
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: It Wasn’t a Strait of Hormuz Relief Rally, After All
items.summary: Why didn’t anything but tech rally on Monday after the U.S. and Iran announced an agreement that would reopen the Strait of Hormuz?  Peter Boockvar, chief investment officer of One Point BFG Wealth Partners, notes that if the market was reacting to the news and lower oil prices, more of the stocks that are exposed to both would have rallied.  Walmart, Costco, and Target were among the stocks that were down despite the prospect of lower gas prices.
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: Costco's Growing Traffic Shows the Power of Its Value Strategy

items.headline: Costco Leans On Gasoline, E Commerce And Wellness To Deepen Member Value
items.summary: Costco Wholesale (NasdaqGS:COST) is reporting record gasoline sales volumes, which are closely tied to member loyalty and in-store spending. Amid elevated fuel prices, Costco is seen outperforming Walmart in market performance and operations, as members seek value on gas and bulk essentials. The company is expanding its U.S. footprint, including a first warehouse in Pensacola, and has plans to add 30 or more locations annually.
